# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: StatefulSet
metadata:
  name: elasticsearch-{{ cluster }} # the cluster identifier, unique per cluster instance - must match $cluster_identifier in configmap_template.yml
spec:
  serviceName: {{ cluster }}-es-public-svc # service name for exposing the statefulset (Elasticsearch) on a public network
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: elasticsearch-{{ cluster }} 
      component: master 
  template: 
    metadata: 
      labels:
        app: elasticsearch-{{ cluster }} 
        component: master 
    spec:
      containers:
       - image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch-oss:6.8.5
         name: {{ cluster }} # the unique name of each statefulset
         env: 
         - name: ES_JAVA_OPTS
           value: "-Xmx2g -Xms2g"
         ports: 
           - containerPort: 9200
             protocol: TCP
{{< end of text >}}
